note: Mathlib/RingTheory/SimpleRing/Defs.lean:27 — 'A ring R is simple if it has only two two-sided ideals, ⊥ and ⊤' (class IsSimpleRing (R) [NonUnitalNonAssocRing R]); same defining ideal-theoretic condition as 'simple algebra' but stated for any ring, not requiring an Algebra/base-field structure, so it's a strict generalization.
